response.justification: Candidate brings strong staff-level engineering experience with directly relevant current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, plus prior high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second. However, the resume lists no Python experience — a must-have for this role — and the technical stack is heavily TypeScript/Node.js/DLang. The breadth of experience, current AI-native role, and demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, trunk-based, CI/CD) warrant a screening conversation to verify Python depth before progressing further.
strengths: Current role directly involves agentic workflows and MCP tooling — matches the AI-native environment
Proven high-throughput distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP req/sec at Sociomantic)
Established Staff-level title with founder experience and strong software-craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
concerns: Python is not listed among skills despite being a must-have; stack is primarily TS/Node/DLang
Limited evidence of formal stakeholder management or product-bridging at scale beyond IC delivery
No explicit ML/LLM model work shown — agentic tooling experience is recent (under a year)
